name: url-script-harvester
description: Fetch a URL, extract scripts (inline + external), detect runtime script injection patterns, map endpoints, and suggest candidate AGNT plugins/tools.
author: James Paul Jackson

schema.title: URL Script Harvester
schema.description: Downloads a page, extracts referenced and inline scripts, flags runtime-injected script patterns, extracts API endpoints/keys, and outputs a structured report.

includeInlineScripts.description: If true, analyze inline <script> blocks too.

maxScriptBytes.description: Max bytes to download per script (truncates above).

writeReport.description: If true, write a JSON report under plugin-data and return reportPath.

status.description: HTTP status of the HTML request

runtimeInjectionFindings.description: Detected runtime script injection patterns + risk score

pluginIdeas.description: Suggested AGNT plugin/tool ideas derived from the findings

reportPath.description: Path to saved JSON report (if writeReport=true)
